_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

data.name: card
constraints: CHECK (track = 'UNMEMORIZED' OR due_at IS NOT NULL)

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "mushaf" ("mushaf_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "riwayah" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "line_count" INTEGER NOT NULL, "page_count" INTEGER NOT NULL, "font_family" TEXT NOT NULL, "checksum_sha256" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("mushaf_id")) STRICT;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "profile" ("profile_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "display_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "role" TEXT NOT NULL, "locale" TEXT NOT NULL, "mushaf_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES mushaf (mushaf_id), "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "settings_json" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), CHECK (role IN ('self', 'student', 'child')), CHECK (locale IN ('ar', 'fa', 'ckb'))) STRICT;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "surah" ("surah_id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "name_ar" TEXT NOT NULL, "revelation" TEXT NOT NULL, "ayah_count" INTEGER NOT NULL, "bismillah_pre" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("bismillah_pre" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("surah_id"), CHECK (surah_id BETWEEN 1 AND 114), CHECK (revelation IN ('meccan', 'medinan')), CHECK (ayah_count > 0)) STRICT;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "page" ("page_id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "juz" INTEGER NOT NULL, "hizb" INTEGER NOT NULL, "rub" INTEGER NOT NULL, "surah_start" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES surah (surah_id), "ayah_start" INTEGER NOT NULL, "surah_end" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES surah (surah_id), "ayah_end" INTEGER NOT NULL, "line_count" INTEGER NOT NULL, "qpc_font_name" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), CHECK (page_id BETWEEN 1 AND 604), CHECK (juz BETWEEN 1 AND 30), CHECK (hizb BETWEEN 1 AND 60), CHECK (rub BETWEEN 1 AND 240)) STRICT;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "card" ("profile_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile (profile_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "page_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES page (page_id), "track" TEXT NOT NULL, "d" REAL NOT NULL, "s" REAL NOT NULL, "last_review_at" INTEGER NULL, "due_at" INTEGER NULL, "reps" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "lapses" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "weak_flag" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("weak_flag" IN (0, 1)), "signoffs" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "manual_lock" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("manual_lock" IN (0, 1)), "prayer_critical" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("prayer_critical" IN (0, 1)), "enabled" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("enabled" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id", "page_id"), CHECK (track IN ('NEW', 'NEAR', 'FAR', 'UNMEMORIZED')), CHECK (d BETWEEN 1 AND 10), CHECK (s >= 0), CHECK (reps >= 0), CHECK (lapses >= 0), CHECK (signoffs >= 0), CHECK (track = 'UNMEMORIZED' OR due_at IS NOT NULL)) STRICT;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "line_block" ("block_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "profile_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile (profile_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "page_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES page (page_id), "line_start" INTEGER NOT NULL, "line_end" INTEGER NOT NULL, "error_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), CHECK (line_start BETWEEN 1 AND 15), CHECK (line_end BETWEEN line_start AND 15), CHECK (error_count >= 0)) STRICT;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "review_log" ("log_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "profile_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile (profile_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "page_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES page (page_id), "reviewed_at" TEXT NOT NULL, "track_at_review" TEXT NOT NULL, "grade" TEXT NOT NULL, "error_lines_json" TEXT NULL, "elapsed_days" INTEGER NOT NULL, "r_predicted" REAL NULL, "s_before" REAL NULL, "s_after" REAL NULL, "d_before" REAL NULL, "d_after" REAL NULL, "source" TEXT NOT NULL, "teacher_label" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), CHECK (track_at_review IN ('NEW', 'NEAR', 'FAR', 'UNMEMORIZED')), CHECK (grade IN ('again', 'hard', 'good', 'easy')), CHECK (source IN ('self', 'teacher'))) STRICT;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ayah" ("ayah_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "surah" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES surah (surah_id), "ayah" INTEGER NOT NULL, "page_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES page (page_id), "line_refs_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "sajda" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("sajda" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("ayah_id")) STRICT;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "confusion_edge" ("profile_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile (profile_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "ayah_a" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES ayah (ayah_id), "ayah_b" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES ayah (ayah_id), "weight" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0, "last_confused_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id", "ayah_a", "ayah_b"), CHECK (ayah_a < ayah_b)) STRICT;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "cycle_config" ("profile_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES profile (profile_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "cycle_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "new_lines_per_day" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "near_window_juz" INTEGER NOT NULL, "far_target_per_day" INTEGER NOT NULL, "far_cycle_days" INTEGER NOT NULL, "daily_budget_minutes" INTEGER NOT NULL, "pure_cycle_mode" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("pure_cycle_mode" IN (0, 1)), "term_label_set" TEXT NOT NULL, "region_preset" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), CHECK (new_lines_per_day >= 0), CHECK (near_window_juz >= 0), CHECK (far_target_per_day >= 0), CHECK (far_cycle_days > 0), CHECK (daily_budget_minutes > 0)) STRICT;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "app_meta" ("key" TEXT NOT NULL, "value" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("key")) STRICT;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "line" ("line_id" INTEGER NOT NULL, "page_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES page (page_id), "line_no" INTEGER NOT NULL, "line_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "ayah_refs_json" TEXT NOT NULL, "text_glyph_ref" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), CHECK (line_no BETWEEN 1 AND 15), CHECK (line_type IN ('ayah', 'surah_header', 'basmala'))) STRICT;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "mutashabih_group" ("group_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "note_key" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), CHECK (type IN ('identical', 'near_identical', 'structural'))) STRICT;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "mutashabih_member" ("group_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES mutashabih_group (group_id), "ayah_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES ayah (ayah_id), "distinguishing_word_index_json" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("group_id", "ayah_id")) STRICT;
CREATE INDEX card_due ON card (profile_id, track, due_at)
CREATE INDEX line_block_by_card ON line_block (profile_id, page_id)
CREATE INDEX review_log_by_card ON review_log (profile_id, page_id, reviewed_at)
CREATE INDEX line_by_page ON line (page_id, line_no)
